title: Labor Day
note: Federal holiday and common family lunch visit day. Confirm guest meal availability with the dining hall.

title: Columbus Day
note: Federal holiday. Check dining hall guest meal policy before planning around lunch.

title: Veterans Day
note: Federal holiday and meaningful visit day for many families.

title: Thanksgiving Day
note: Major family dining holiday. Confirm guest reservations, meal times, and seating rules early.

title: Hanukkah
timing: Begins at sundown on December 4 and ends at nightfall on December 12.
note: Eight-day Jewish festival. Families may want to coordinate evening or weekend visits.

note: Major family dining holiday. Confirm guest reservations, meal times, and seating rules early.

note: Federal holiday. Good day to check dining room hours before planning a visit.

note: Federal holiday. Often called Presidents Day by other calendars.
